heading: Omitted
label: 1184 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which related to payment of shares of deceased enrollees and enrollees who are less than twenty-one years of age or under a legal disability, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 90–508, § 482 Stat. 862Sept. 21, 1968
